message:
feat(command): add Lua metatable support, coroutine stubs, and string.byte fixes

Implement setmetatable/getmetatable with __index metamethod chain
traversal (depth-limited to 16) for table field access, method calls,
and index expressions. This enables Lua scripts that use prototype-based
OOP patterns common in Redis EVAL workloads.

Add coroutine table with stub functions that error on call, matching
Redis behavior where coroutines are not supported in EVAL context.

Fix string.byte to handle negative indices per Lua 5.1 semantics
(negative indices count from end of string).

Fix table array truncation: setting an array element to nil now trims
trailing nils to maintain correct table length semantics.

Includes tests for metatable chains, coroutine stubs, string.rep edge
cases, and math.random range limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
